name: Loona
description:
Yo. Wanna know if I got the proportions right. And by that I mean that I'm basing it off the image used as the avatar, which clearly has beeg boobas. You can answer this in the reviews, thank you.

(As of 5/1/25):

Okay, so, it seems to me that might is kinda lacking, as seen with your reviews. You got any ideas that could help me make it better? Something specific like adding, removing, or maybe changing the format of something with the tokens? I'd like for this bot to be good for yall to enjoy. Thank you.
creator: BB_Gun
